session.title: v0.6 slice A — foundation infrastructure + About dialog
session.conversation_reference: Claude Code conversation opened against PRDs/product/crmbuilder-v2/prompts/CLAUDE-CODE-PROMPT-v2-ui-v0.6-A-foundation.md, the first of six slice prompts authored by SES-036 (styling Conversation 2 build-planning, applied at SES-036 after the reconciliation at commit b41fb04). Built the foundation layer of the v0.6 styling release per ui-PRD-v0.6.md §2 items 1-6 plus item 11 (About dialog as canary surface). Landed at commit 7e5c010 on 05-18-26 at 01:35 ET.
session.topics_covered:
Seed prompt: PRDs/product/crmbuilder-v2/prompts/CLAUDE-CODE-PROMPT-v2-ui-v0.6-A-foundation.md. This conversation built the foundational layer of v0.6 styling: the token system, asset bundling for fonts and icons, modal elevation infrastructure, and a re-skinned About dialog acting as a canary exercise of the new token plumbing end-to-end.

Token system rewrite in ui/styling.py replaced the 72-line v0.1 minimal QSS stub from DEC-024 with a full theme-keyed TOKENS dict (per DEC-089), a t() accessor, a build_app_stylesheet() generator, and an apply_stylesheet(app) entry point. The light theme codifies every value from styling-design-pass.md §1 (color, space, font, radius, border, shadow tokens). Legacy module constants (ACCENT_COLOR, ACCENT_HOVER, ERROR_TEXT_COLOR, DEFAULT_FONT_FAMILY, DEFAULT_FONT_POINT_SIZE) were removed; consumers in panels/engagements.py migrated alongside splash.py.

Asset bundling under ui/assets/ added Inter Variable v4.1 + JetBrains Mono Variable v2.304 per DEC-090 (OFL license bundled) and the initial 14-SVG Lucide icon wave per DEC-092 (ISC license bundled). The ui/icons.py loader exposes lucide(name, size, color_token) with runtime SVG color tinting and (name, size, color_token) caching. Modal elevation per DEC-091 landed as ui/elevation.py (apply_dialog_shadow helper using QGraphicsDropShadowEffect) plus ui/widgets/modal_backdrop.py (ModalBackdropOverlay with attach/detach module functions, fade-in via QPropertyAnimation on windowOpacity). Five modal dialogs received per-dialog hooks: crud_dialog (covers CRUD + CRUD-delete), versioned_replace_dialog (covers Charter + Status replace), about_dialog, dialogs/error, dialogs/reference_delete. list_detail_panel.py got chrome-only hooks (objectName, splitter handle, 45/55 default split) since it is not modal.

Notable finding: Inter Variable v4.x registers under the family name 'Inter Variable' rather than the expected 'Inter' — ui/app.py needs an Inter → 'Inter Variable' substitution after QFontDatabase loads bundled fonts; without it, the project QSS that references 'Inter' would fall through to the system fallback. About dialog re-skin per design pass §2.8 and DEC-094 restructured to wordmark + tagline header + vertical two-line metadata list + single right-aligned Close button; serves as the canary surface exercising the full token system end-to-end. test_about_dialog.py updated to walk the new vertical layout and to match the 'API base url' sentence-cased label. Full v2 test suite: 1236 passed, 1 skipped (v0.5 inventory remains green).
session.artifacts_produced: Committed at 7e5c010: crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/ui/styling.py (rewritten in place — 72-line stub replaced by full token + builder layer); crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/ui/icons.py (new — lucide loader with color tinting and caching); crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/ui/elevation.py (new — apply_dialog_shadow helper); crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/ui/widgets/modal_backdrop.py (new — ModalBackdropOverlay); crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/ui/assets/fonts/ (Inter Variable + JetBrains Mono Variable + combined OFL); crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/ui/assets/icons/lucide/ (14 SVGs + ISC license); crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/ui/about_dialog.py (re-skinned per design pass §2.8); crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/ui/splash.py + ui/panels/engagements.py (legacy ACCENT_COLOR migrated to t()); five dialog files received per-dialog modal hooks (crud_dialog, versioned_replace_dialog, about_dialog, dialogs/error, dialogs/reference_delete); ui/base/list_detail_panel.py chrome hooks; ui/app.py font loading + Inter substitution + apply_stylesheet call; tests/crmbuilder_v2/ui/test_about_dialog.py updated for vertical layout.
session.in_flight_at_end: Slice B (sidebar + master-pane delegate per CLAUDE-CODE-PROMPT-v2-ui-v0.6-B-sidebar-and-master-pane.md) is next. Five remaining slices C-F plus a follow-up palette-fix conversation will land between this slice and v0.6 release closeout.
